english: vaded by the grateful feeling of sinlessness; this is the sixfold mental happiness of the Yogi.

a drop, t́igs-pa re-ré-nas (thigs pa re re nas) in drops, by drops Glr.; čar-t́igs (char thigs) a drop of rain; gser-t́ig-po (gser thig po) (sic) Mil. seems to denote a drop or globule of molten gold, which in this form is offered for sale by gold-washers.

v. _t́ib-pa ('thib pa) and gtib-pa (gtib pa); t́ib-t́ib (thib thib) very dark Sch.; byin-rlabs t́ibs-t́ibs (byin rlabs thibs thibs) Pth. seems to imply the descending of a blessing upon a person; t́ib(s)-po (thib(s) po), mo (mo) dense, Cs. or perh. nothing but obscure, dark, nags (nags) Stg.

also _tim-pa ('thim pa), rtim-pa (rtim pa) and stim-pa (stim pa), gen. with la (la) or naṅ-du (nang du), to disappear by being imbibed, absorbed; to evaporate, of fluids; of a snake: to creep away, to disappear in a hole; frq. of the vanishing of rays of lights, of gods etc.; to be melted, dissolved (salt or sugar in water); to sink, dran-méd-du (dran med du) into unconsciousness Mil.
1. num. fig.: 70. -- 2. *t́u gyáb-če* (thu gyab ce) W. to spit, with la (la), to spit at or on. -- 3. often erron. for mťu (mthu).

1. also t́ú-pa (thu pa), skirt, coat-flap Glr. -- 2. rarely _t́u-ba ('thu ba), bad, e.g. wood Mil.; *gyal-t́u* (gyal thu) W. good and bad promiscuously; sdug-bsṅál t́u-ba (sdug bsngal thu ba) a bad accident Thgy.; malicious, wicked, vicious Glr. -- 3. vb., v. _t́u-ba ('thu ba).
a chief; an elder brother, Dzl., Tar.; t́u-mo (thu mo) Cs.: mistress, lady (?).
a lump of metal B.; W. cannon-ball.
C. also *t́ug-pa* (thug pa), c. accus. until, to, in reference to time and space; *żag zib-ču t́ug* (zhag zib chu thug) for forty days; only col.
Sch.: 'dreadful noise'; Thgy. t́ug-tsóm (thug tsom); Mil. t́ug-sgrá (thug sgra) id.

I. sbst. soup, broth, _bras-t́ug ('bras thug) rice-soup, bag-t́ug (bag thug) meal-soup, gruel, rgya-t́ug (rgya thug) Chinese soup, a sort of vermicelli-soup C.; t́ug-t́ál (thug thal) v. t́ál-ba (thal ba). II. vb. 1. to reach, arrive at, come to, c. dat. or termin., tséï mťar t́ug-pa (tshe'i mthar thug pa) to reach the natural term of life Dzl.; to come or go as far as Dzl.; rús-pa-la t́ug-pa (rus pa la thug pa) to pierce to the quick Dzl.; śi-la tug tse (shi la thug tshe) Mil., _či-bar t́ug-pa-la ('chi bar thug pa la) Lt. when one is near death; ... la t́ug-gi bár-du (la thug gi bar du) till, until Dzl., Tar., Pth.; bzúṅ-la t́ug (bzung la thug) he was just on the point of seizing her Dzl.; *sád-da tug* (sad da thug) W. going to kill; śi-la (shi la) (or bsád-pa-la (bsad pa la)) t́ug-pa (thug pa) often means deserving death (of culprits) Dzl.; tse _pó-ba-la t́ug kyaṅ (tshe 'pho ba la thug kyang) though life is at stake Dzl.; in like manner W.: *lus śrog daṅ t́ug-te ča dug* (lus shrog dang thug te ca dug) he goes at the peril of his life; t́ug-yas (thug yas) not to be reached, endless Cs. -- 2. to meet, to light upon, c. la (la) or daṅ (dang), = _prád-pa ('phrad pa), esp. col. *nyi-ráṅ-la t́ug-ga-la yoṅs* (nyi rang la thug ga la yongs) W. he has come to see you; *t́ug yin* (thug yin) W. we shall meet again, = till we meet again! à revoir! jág-pa daṅ t́ug-pa (jag pa dang thug pa) Mil. to fall in with robbers; gdoṅ t́ug-pa (gdong thug pa) = t́úg-pa (thug pa); či-la t́ug ruṅ (ci la thug rung) Mil., *gá-la t́ug kyaṅ* (ga la thug kyang) C. whatever may happen to me; t́ug-čád (thug chad) agreement to meet Sch. -- 3. col. to touch, to hit or strike against, W.: *ï-ru t́ug-kaṅ* (i ru thug kang) here it touches, or strikes against; here is the rub; *lag-pa mi t́ug yin* (lag pa mi thug yin) I shall not touch it, I shall not come near with my hand; *dé-la t́ug kyaṅ ma t́ug* (de la thug kyang ma thug) W. do not even touch it!

resp. for snyiṅ (snying), yid (yid), sems (sems), bsám-pa (bsam pa), blo (blo) etc., and whenever mental qualities or actions are spoken of in respectful language, v. below. 1. heart, breast, in a physical sense, gen. t́ugs-ka (thugs ka); t́ugs-kyi sprúl-pa (thugs kyi sprul pa) the incarnation of a deity, originating in a ray of light which proceeds from the breast of that deity Glr. -- 2. heart, in a spiritual sense, mind, soul, spirit, will, v. below; design, purpose, intention, sbyin-pai t́ug zlóg-tu ysol (sbyin pa'i thug zlog tu gsol) we beg to desist from the intention of giving Dzl.; understanding, intellect Glr. (v. sgám-pa (sgam pa)); t́ugs-
